cases.name: routine imaging auto-approved
cases.input_text: Pt 69yo F c/o R knee pain x 6 wks. Dx M17.11. Req MRI R knee w/o contrast. Failed PT x 6 wks, naproxen 500mg BID. Provider: Dr. Sarah Chen NPI 1234567890. Payer: Aetna AETNA-001. Patient PAT-001. Service date 2027-06-15.
cases.mock_response: {"request_type":"prior_auth","patient_id":"PAT-001","provider_name":"Dr. Sarah Chen","provider_npi":"1234567890","payer_name":"Aetna","payer_id":"AETNA-001","diagnoses":[{"code":"M17.11","display":"Primary osteoarthritis, right knee","rank":"primary"}],"procedures":[{"code":"73721","display":"MRI knee without contrast","quantity":1}],"service_date":"2027-06-15","urgency":"routine","clinical_justification":"Persistent right knee pain x 6 weeks, unresponsive to physical therapy and NSAIDs. ROM limited to 90 degrees flexion.","prior_treatments":["physical therapy x 6 weeks","naproxen 500mg BID x 4 weeks"],"notes":[]}

cases.name: high-cost knee replacement requires clinical review
cases.input_text: 72yo M severe R knee OA, KL grade IV. Failed 14 months conservative mgmt. Requesting TKA. Provider: Dr. James Park NPI 9876543210. Payer: UnitedHealthcare. Patient PAT-002.
cases.mock_response: {"request_type":"prior_auth","patient_id":"PAT-002","provider_name":"Dr. James Park","provider_npi":"9876543210","payer_name":"UnitedHealthcare","payer_id":"UHC-001","diagnoses":[{"code":"M17.11","display":"Primary osteoarthritis, right knee","rank":"primary"}],"procedures":[{"code":"27447","display":"Total knee arthroplasty","quantity":1}],"service_date":"2027-08-01","urgency":"routine","clinical_justification":"Severe osteoarthritis right knee, Kellgren-Lawrence grade IV. Failed 12 months of conservative management including PT, NSAIDs, injections.","prior_treatments":["physical therapy x 12 weeks","NSAIDs x 6 months","corticosteroid injection x 3","hyaluronic acid injection"],"notes":[]}

cases.name: missing medical necessity requires review
cases.input_text: Patient has back pain. Requesting lumbar fusion. Dr. Wong NPI 4444444444. BCBS. Patient PAT-005.
cases.mock_response: {"request_type":"prior_auth","patient_id":"PAT-005","provider_name":"Dr. Lisa Wong","provider_npi":"4444444444","payer_name":"Blue Cross Blue Shield","payer_id":"BCBS-001","diagnoses":[{"code":"M51.36","display":"Lumbar disc degeneration","rank":"primary"}],"procedures":[{"code":"22630","display":"Lumbar spinal fusion","quantity":1}],"service_date":"2027-09-01","urgency":"routine","clinical_justification":"Patient has back pain.","prior_treatments":[],"notes":["No prior conservative treatments documented"]}

cases.name: invalid codes rejected at validation
cases.input_text: Patient needs procedure. Invalid codes provided.

cases.name: always-review procedure triggers review
cases.input_text: Requesting unlisted nervous system procedure for chronic pain. Dr. Chen. Aetna. Patient PAT-008.
cases.mock_response: {"request_type":"prior_auth","patient_id":"PAT-008","provider_name":"Dr. Sarah Chen","provider_npi":"1234567890","payer_name":"Aetna","payer_id":"AETNA-001","diagnoses":[{"code":"G89.29","display":"Other chronic pain","rank":"primary"}],"procedures":[{"code":"64999","display":"Unlisted procedure, nervous system","quantity":1}],"service_date":"2027-07-01","urgency":"routine","clinical_justification":"Chronic pain unresponsive to multiple treatments.","prior_treatments":["physical therapy","gabapentin","nerve block x 2"],"notes":[]}
